name: stripe
description: Stripe CLI — payments, subscriptions, webhook testing

install_methods.shell_command: set -e && VER=$(curl -sI https://github.com/stripe/stripe-cli/releases/latest | grep -i location | sed 's/.*tag\/v//' | tr -d '\r\n') && curl -sSL https://github.com/stripe/stripe-cli/releases/download/v${VER}/stripe_${VER}_linux_x86_64.tar.gz -o /tmp/_stripe.tgz && cd /tmp && tar -xzf _stripe.tgz stripe && sudo mv stripe /usr/local/bin/ && rm -f _stripe.tgz
